text_block_list.text:
One day, Narita Brian is sitting in the<n>library,
seemingly at her wits' end.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I don't get any of this. How the<n>heck am I
supposed to make sense<n>of the track layout?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, how do you not get a<n>headache
reading all those books?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What did you say about my head?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your mood seems worse than usual<n>today. Is
something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Never mind, it's nothing. Just ignore<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Go on. Given your demeanor, it<n>appears you
have need of my<n>assistance.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Please. You can read minds now or<n>something?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're simply an open book. You<n>always have
been.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch. Fine... I got asked to organize a<n>race for the
Fan Fest. It's one of my<n>student council duties.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so that's why you've been<n>staring at that
track layout.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Happy now? That's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Stop acting so tough. Your vexation is<n>written on
your face.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Actually, I'm grappling with an<n>issue
that's proving difficult to solve,<n>even for me.
Let's try something.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We'll help each other—in return for<n>my
assistance, I'd like you to handle<n>my problem.
Deal?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Help each other? I... guess that's<n>fine.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! With that settled, this<n>shouldn't take
long! We sisters will<n>make this the best race
ever!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're way too eager about this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am! It's not every day<n>you ask for
my help!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh... And this is why, you know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Well, we can figure out the race thing<n>later. What
issue are you having?<n>Must be a big one if
you're asking<n>for my help.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It is. Truthfully, it's a problem only<n>you can solve.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But as long as you apply yourself,<n>I'm sure
you'll be able to resolve the<n>matter by the end of
the day. Now,<n>come with me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Quit messing around and tell me what<n>to do
already.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I have a younger sister<n>who detests
vegetables, and I wish<n>for her to eat them
without any<n>bellyaching.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: This should be child's play for you.<n>Now, go on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Refusal is not an option. You've<n>already agreed
to this. All right, good<n>luck.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You set me up!
